# 测试 1: Agent._strip_quotes
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "/Volumes/my/autosearch_agent")

from src.agent import Agent

assert Agent._strip_quotes('echo "hello > world"') == 'echo __QUOTED__', f"Got: {Agent._strip_quotes('echo \"hello > world\"')}"
assert Agent._strip_quotes("echo 'x > 0'") == "echo __QUOTED__", f"Got: {Agent._strip_quotes(\"echo 'x > 0'\")}"
assert Agent._strip_quotes("echo hello > out.txt") == "echo hello > out.txt"  # 无引号不变
print("✅ _strip_quotes: 3/3 passed")

# _is_dangerous_command 测试
assert Agent._is_dangerous_command('python3 -c "print(x > 0)"') is None, "引号内 > 不应误报"
assert Agent._is_dangerous_command("echo hello > out.txt") is not None, "裸 > 应检测为危险"
assert Agent._is_dangerous_command("rm -rf /tmp/test") is not None, "rm 应检测为危险"
assert Agent._is_dangerous_command("ls -la") is None, "ls 应是安全的"
assert Agent._is_dangerous_command("python -m pytest") is None, "pytest 应是安全的"
print("✅ _is_dangerous_command: 5/5 passed")

# _detect_fake_tool_calls 测试
assert Agent._detect_fake_tool_calls("let me read_file('test.py')") == True
assert Agent._detect_fake_tool_calls("```python\nread_file('test.py')\n```") == False  # 代码块内不检测
assert Agent._detect_fake_tool_calls("I will analyze the code") == False
print("✅ _detect_fake_tool_calls: 3/3 passed")

# _classify_api_error 测试

assert etype == "interrupted"

assert etype2 == "error"

loaded = mm2.load_archival()
assert loaded == 2, f"Expected 2, got {loaded}"
assert mm2.archival[0].content == "测试事实1"

修复 bug

sys.path.insert(0, "/Volumes/my/autosearch_agent")

from src.agent import Agent

cases = [
    # (命令, 期望是否危险, 描述)
    ('python3 -c "print(1 > 0)"', False, '双引号内 >'),
    ("python3 -c 'print(1 > 0)'", False, '单引号内 >'),
    ('echo hello > /tmp/out.txt', True, '裸重定向'),
    ('cat file | grep pattern > out.txt', True, '管道后重定向'),
    ('python3 -c "x=1" > out.txt', True, '引号后裸重定向'),
    ('rm -rf /', True, 'rm 命令'),
    ('git log --oneline', False, '安全命令'),
    ('echo "rm -rf /"', True, 'rm 在引号内——注意这是已知限制'),
    ('sudo rm file.txt', True, 'sudo rm'),
    ('xargs rm < list.txt', True, 'xargs rm'),
    ('', False, '空字符串'),
    ('   ', False, '纯空白'),
    ('chmod 777 /tmp/test', True, 'chmod'),
    ('dd if=/dev/zero of=/dev/sda', True, 'dd'),
]

print("=== _is_dangerous_command 边界测试 ===")
passed = 0
failed = 0
known_limitations = 0
for cmd, expect_dangerous, desc in cases:
    result = Agent._is_dangerous_command(cmd)
    is_dangerous = result is not None
    ok = is_dangerous == expect_dangerous
    
    if ok:
        passed += 1
        print(f"  ✅ {desc}")
    else:
        # 检查是否是已知限制
        if 'rm 在引号内' in desc:
            known_limitations += 1
            print(f"  ⚠️  {desc} (已知限制: rm 检测不排除引号内容)")
        else:
            failed += 1
            print(f"  ❌ {desc}: cmd={cmd!r}, expected dangerous={expect_dangerous}, got={result!r}")

print(f"\n结果: {passed} passed, {failed} failed, {known_limitations} known limitations")

e2 = Agent._enrich_tool_error("edit_file", fail_result, fail_count=2)

print("  ✅ edit_file 多次失败: 升级建议 write_file")

# 不修改原始 result
assert "hint" not in fail_result, "不应污染原始 result"
print("  ✅ 不污染原始 result 对象")

# === ToolExecutor 边界测试 ===
print("\n=== ToolExecutor 边界测试 ===")
from src.tools import ToolExecutor

te = ToolExecutor()

# list_files 不存在路径

assert r["success"] == False
print("  ✅ list_files 不存在路径: 返回失败")

# search_files 空模式
r2 = te.search_files("*.absolutely_nothing_matches_this_xyz")
assert r2["success"] == True and len(r2["matches"]) == 0
print("  ✅ search_files 无匹配: 返回空列表")

# undo 空栈

assert r3["success"] == False and "没有可撤销" in r3["error"]
print("  ✅ undo 空栈: 正确拒绝")

print("  ✅ execute_command 超时: 正确报错")

# === WorkingSummary 边界测试 ===
print("\n=== WorkingSummary 边界测试 ===")
from src.memory import WorkingSummary, MemoryManager
